title: centaurea scabiosa var. ossethica
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. ossethica, also known as Ossetian scabious or blue thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Centaurea scabiosa var. ossethica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
